resources.string: A vocalist in the band "Cross Nightmares". Tends to smoke in the back alley and often skip classes for practice.
A very negative person with a tendency to be self-destructive. Rarely avoids class but can be pretty unstable.
A young, promising woman. Intelligent and resourceful. A social butterfly and a good influence on others.
An influential young man, popular in the modeling industry. Has a lot of wealth and influence over others.
An aggressive young man with a tendency to lash out and cause trouble. Becomes much calmer when together with his friend.
A curious, intelligent young woman with a thirst for knowledge.
A calm and collected young man that tends to stick to Ms. Carol\'s side.
An intelligent and promising young man. Doesn\'t show as much interest in knowledge as his siblings, but rarely causes trouble. Tends to keep close to Mr. Morningstar.
A socially anxious but otherwise polite and kind young man. Always has Mr. Gabriel visiting and hovering over his shoulder. Keep an eye on them both.
An aspiring writer and storyteller. Rarely has trouble in class but gets easily overwhelmed and overly nervous.
